commands.review_summary:
The branch switches the CLI version fast path to root-only version detection, adds a regression test for `skills verify ... --version`, and updates a config plugin-validation fixture to use the installed-plugin record writer.

PR surface: Source -4, Tests +10. Total +6 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main's `configureProgramHelp` exits on any `--version` token while `skills verify` defines its own `--version <version>` option. I did not run the command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer/contributor handling of a dirty PR branch and protected-label review, not an automated code finding.

target.title: fix(cli): respect subcommand version options
target.body:
## Summary
- Narrow the custom root `--version` fast path so subcommand-scoped `--version <value>` options are not swallowed before Commander parses them.
- Add a regression test for `openclaw skills verify discrawl --version 1.0.0` style invocations.

## Verification
- `bun run vitest run src/cli/program/help.test.ts` -> 6 passed
- `pnpm format:check -- src/cli/program/help.ts src/cli/program/help.test.ts` -> clean
- Smoke-tested against local OCM env `skill-trust-main-smoke`: `skills verify discrawl --version 1.0.0` returned `decision: pass`, `securityStatus: clean`, and `cardAvailable: true`.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
